---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this solve? Why is this feature needed?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. How should it work?

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've considered and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or extra context that might help.
